items.name_en: 《With full original counter packaging》!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Small (19cm) Bowling Tote/Shoulder Bag~Red Sheepskin
items.name_cn:
《With full original counter packaging》!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Small (19cm) Bowling Tote/Shoulder Bag~Red Sheepskin
This tote features Matelasse craftsmanship, offering a fresh interpretation of a classic silhouette with a 3D texture and exquisite texture. The front letter logo and metal hardware subtly complement each other, with exquisite workmanship that stands out, showcasing a highly recognizable classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with a modern charm.
~Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
~Zipper closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB123.
Size: W19×H13×Dcm.
Color: Red full leather/Original leather
Made in Italy

items.name_en: With full original retail packaging 🌷【New】MIU vintage shoulder bag, brand new soft nappa leather full of retro nostalgia, paired with aged metal hardware, premium and elegant texture, drawstring closure design, fine pleated ruffles are three-dimensional and playful, high-end yet lazy and casual, lined with brand new striped canvas, equipped with a zippered pocket, unique design looks good on everyone.

items.name_en: Suede [Small Dark Brown] Available
items.name_cn:
Suede [Small Dark Brown] Available
MIUMI^24FW Autumn/Winter Suede Series Bowling Bag
The hottest element this autumn and winter should be suede! Softy padded is a reinterpretation of the classic bowling bag shape. The simple design highlights the bag's diverse functionality and practical concept. The brand new suede material maximizes the autumn/winter atmosphere, exuding a super high-end retro tone. Which one is your pick from the MIUMI^ Autumn/Winter series?

Top-tier imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern, exquisite and structured body, front embossed logo matches the leather color, detachable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, cotton satin lining, zippered pocket, many celebrities and influencers are wearing it. items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
MIUMIU Long Handle Baguette Bag
Recently inspired by the trendy long-handle baguette design. The 24 Fall/Winter new arrival revolves around a 'girlish sentiment' with a scholarly vibe. It embodies an uninhibited and elegant young lady's attitude and a casual outlook on life, unique to Miu Miu girls. Not too big or small, just right. Sweet, spicy, or cool. The capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical. Hard not to love it.
Size: Base 28×8×16cm

items.name_en: 5BC158: Miu Miu new arrival, classic Matelasse craftsmanship, top-grade imported lambskin. The refined 3D bag shape and premium texture reinterpret the soft charm of this calfskin handbag. The craftsmanship and design fuse many of Miu Miu's most unique signature elements. Equipped with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying styles to add to its fashion appeal and modern style. Cotton satin lining included. Size: 24×11.5×7cm💕(with original packaging)

items.name_en: 5BG306, Miu Miu new tassel drawstring dumpling bag. Imported lambskin with vintage gold hardware. The drawstring closure features fine, dense pleats that look like ruffles, adding a three-dimensional and playful touch. Long dual handles allow for shoulder or hand carrying, or holding it casually at the waist, creating a lazy, casual vibe. Stylish and versatile, perfect for daily outings or commuting.

5BG306, Miu Miu new tassel drawstring dumpling bag. Imported lambskin with vintage gold hardware. The drawstring closure features fine, dense pleats that look like ruffles, adding a three-dimensional and playful touch. Long dual handles allow for shoulder or hand carrying, or holding it casually at the waist, creating a lazy, casual vibe. Stylish and versatile, perfect for daily outings or commuting.
Size: 32×16×10.5cm
